rule_schema.rule_id: string — stable identifier, matches output.finding_type convention
rule_schema.enabled: bool — explicit in every base rule; overrideable per tenant

condition._note: Additional fields depend on condition.type — see condition_type_schemas below

rule_schema.health_penalty_weight: number | null — null for findings_engine rules; integer for reconciliation rules

output.finding_type: string — what the motor emits as finding_type
output.message_template: string — uses {field} placeholders from condition fields
output.traceability_fields: array<string> — fields that must appear in traceability.raw_values

rule_schema.policy_overrideable: array<string> — explicit list of fields tenants may override

tenant_override_schema.rule_id: string — must reference an existing rule_id in rules.v2.json

overrides._note: Only fields listed in the base rule's policy_overrideable array are valid here

motor_output._description: Contrato canónico que el motor debe producir por cada regla disparada
motor_output._status: not yet implemented — defines the target shape for the future evaluator

finding.rule_id: string — referencia al catálogo para trazabilidad
finding.finding_type: string — igual a output.finding_type de la regla
finding.severity: string — uno de severity_enum con override aplicado si existe
finding.message: string — message_template renderizado con valores reales
finding.module: string — módulo que disparó la regla

excluded_from_scope.reason: Requiere modelo de comunicación separado — no es estructura de datos de evaluación
